title: Session 1: Introduction to Derivatives
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview This session provides a brief overview of Unit 1 and describes the derivative as the slope of a tangent line. It concludes by stating the main formula defining the derivative.
Lecture Videos and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Introduction to 18.01 Clip 2: Geometric Interpretation of Differentiation Clip 3: Limit of Secants Clip 4: Slope as Ratio Clip 5: Main Formula Worked Example Secants and Tangents
